items.title: Much of DHS set to shut down as Democrats demand new restraints on ICE
items.description: Democrats are pushing for new policies requiring agents to wear body cameras and get judicial warrants for raids.

items.title: White House, RFK Jr. shake up health leadership after controversies
items.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s health department is undergoing a major leadership overhaul.

items.title: U.S. orders second aircraft carrier to Middle East as Trump pressures Iran
items.description: The USS Gerald R. Ford, deployed since June, will cross the Atlantic for a second time despite a Navy warning that the warship needs maintenance.
